Darren,

From: "Secrest, Melinda" msecrest@wexner.net
To: "Peg Ugland" pegu@naproperty.com
X-OriginalArrivalTime: 28 Aug 2006 18:55:53.0497
(UTC) FILETIME=[9649D890:01C6CAD3]

From: Moses, Larry
Sent: Sunday, August 27, 2006 5:02 AM
To: Secrest, Melinda
Cc: Meyers, Liz
Subject: Abba Eban Project grant request

This grant is of the highest priority in terms of
acquiring the funds and sending them to Eli Evans.

Liz has a copy of the letter dated May 10, 2006
from Mr. Evans with the name and address of the
organization.

The check needs to be made out to "Jewish Media
Fund" and sent:

c/o Eli Evans, Charles H. Revson Foundation

55 East 59th Street

New York, NY 10022

Phone: 212 935 3340

Ideally, I'd like the check produced as early as
possible this coming week and federal expressed to
him without even a small delay.

Thank you,

Larry
